explanation: The property states that globally (G), if the system is in either PCV mode or PSV mode and the Expiratory Pause is initiated by the GUI (expiratoryPauseButton), then eventually (F) an Expiratory Pause will occur. This captures the 'possibility' as an eventual occurrence in LTL.

The property states that globally, if the system is in either PCV or PSV mode AND the 'expiratoryPauseButton' is set by the GUI, then it is eventually possible for an 'expiratoryPause' to be initiated. 'bool_exp1' represents being in PCV or PSV mode, 'bool_exp2' represents the 'expiratoryPauseButton' being set, and 'bool_exp3' represents the initiation of an 'expiratoryPause'. The 'G' operator ensures this holds at all times, and the 'F' operator captures the 'possibility to initiate' (eventually).

The property states that globally, if the system is in PCV mode or PSV mode and the expiratory pause button is pressed, then an expiratory pause will eventually be initiated. This captures the requirement that there shall be the possibility to initiate an Expiratory Pause under the specified conditions.

The LTL property states that globally, if the system is in either PCV or PSV mode and the expiratory pause is set by the GUI, then an expiratory pause shall eventually occur. This captures the requirement for the possibility of initiation under the specified conditions.

The property states that globally (G), if the system is in either PCV or PSV mode and the Expiratory Pause is set by the GUI (expiratoryPauseButton), then eventually (F) an Expiratory Pause will occur. This captures the 'possibility to initiate' and the conditional activation based on mode and GUI input.

The property states that globally, if the system is in either PCV or PSV mode and the expiratory pause is set by the GUI, then an expiratory pause must eventually be initiated. This captures the 'possibility to initiate' as an eventual occurrence triggered by the GUI setting within the specified modes.

The property states that globally (G), whenever the system is in either PCV mode or PSV mode (represented by bool_exp1) AND the expiratory pause is set by the GUI (represented by bool_exp2), then it must eventually (F) initiate an expiratory pause (represented by bool_exp3). This captures the 'possibility to initiate' under the given conditions.

The property states that globally (G), if the system is in either PCV mode or PSV mode (represented by bool_exp1) and the expiratory pause is set by the GUI (represented by bool_exp2), then eventually (F) an expiratory pause will be initiated (represented by bool_exp3). This captures the requirement for the 'possibility to initiate' by guaranteeing its eventual occurrence upon the trigger in the specified operating modes.

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in PCV mode or PSV mode AND the expiratory pause button is set by the GUI, then eventually an expiratory pause will be initiated. This captures the 'possibility to initiate' as a future event triggered by the GUI input within the specified modes.

The property states that globally (G), if the system is in either PCV or PSV mode and the 'expiratoryPauseButton' is pressed (bool_exp1), then an 'expiratoryPause' (bool_exp3) will eventually (F) be initiated. This captures the requirement that when the conditions are met, there is a possibility (guaranteed eventual initiation) of an Expiratory Pause.
